% This is generated by ESQL's CoalesceTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

### COALESCE
Returns the first of its arguments that is not null. If all arguments are null, it returns `null`.

```esql
ROW a=null, b="b"
| EVAL COALESCE(a, b)
```
